notes: A serious multi-format playback/decoding engine (FLAC, Ogg, MP3, DSD…). v1 extraction is Swift-only and this package is ObjC-first — verdicts wait for the ObjC extractor; manifest floors: macOS 11 / iOS 15 / tvOS 15.

evidence.note: the playback engine's primary surface is Objective-C (194 files unparsed in v1); Swift-side extraction found no anchorable player symbol — honestly unverified rather than guessed
